name: forward_to_n8n
description: Forwards a chat message to a local n8n webhook (http://localhost:5678/webhook/pasoe) and returns the response. Supports custom session_id, action, and endpoint overrides.

chat_input.description: The message or prompt to forward to the n8n webhook.

session_id.description: Session ID for the n8n workflow. Defaults to 2001.

action.description: Action to send. Defaults to sendMessage.

endpoint.description: n8n webhook URL. Defaults to http://localhost:5678/webhook/pasoe.
